sql.where:
and v.venue_name like CONCAT('%',#{venueName},'%')
and u.username like CONCAT('%',#{username},'%')
and vc.is_deleted = 0 and v.is_deleted = 0

mapper.select:
select from venue_collect vc left join user u on u.id = vc.user_id left join venue v on v.id = vc.venue_id
order by vc.id desc
select * from venue_collect where user_id = #{id} and collect = 1 and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into venue_collect( venue_id, user_id, collect, create_time, update_time, is_deleted )values ( #{venueId}, #{id}, 1, now(), now(), 0 )
mapper.delete: delete from venue_collect where user_id = #{id} and venue_id = #{venueId}
